title: Rewrite a topic-label slide title into an answer-first claim
guidance: Reward a claim a reader could disagree with, supported by the body. Penalise a topic label.

runner_input.instruction: Replace the working title with one that states the takeaway of the numbers.
runner_input.constraints: Max 14 words. One idea. Supported only by the body below.

items: ARR £11.2m, growing to a £39.5m FY31F plan (28% CAGR)
Plan is conservative on price (4% vs 5.8% realised)

rubric_notes: A strong title asserts that the economics are durable and the plan is conservative — not 'Financial profile'.
Anything implying a specific multiple or exit is unsupported by the body.
